The '''giant dianoga''' was a colossal [[Dianoga/Legends|dianoga]] creature dwelling in the [[Sewers of Coruscant|sewers]] of the [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]], [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], around [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].

==Biology and appearance==
Many times larger than an average dianoga and easily dwarfing a [[Human/Legends|Human]], the giant dianoga sported several barbed tentacles and a gaping maw lined with sharp teeth, not unlike that of a [[Sarlacc/Legends|sarlacc]]. The creature possessed a giant red eyestalk which was about equal in length to its tentacles.<ref name="SotE" />

==History==
Only one specimen was recorded in [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] [[Timeline of galactic history/Legends|history]] by the [[Imperial Era/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. It inhabited the chamber of the [[Sewers of Coruscant|sewers]] directly under the lobby of the influential [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor's]] [[Xizor's Palace|palace]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], when a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] team led by the renowned rebel pilot and [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] in training [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] attempted to infiltrate the palace via the sewer system, the dianoga was killed by [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Dash Rendar/Legends|Dash Rendar]] after he was trapped in its chamber. Rendar bested the creature by firing at its prominent eyestalk.<ref name="SotE" />

==Behind the scenes==
The giant dianoga made its only appearance in the [[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (video game)|video game adaptation]] of ''[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire]]'' as the boss of the "Sewers of Imperial City" level. Since the game's storyline directly contradicted that of its source material, Dash's encounter with the beast may or may not be considered [[canon]] within the [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] continuity. However, that doesn't necessarily discount the canonical status of the species itself.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (video game)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' video game]]
